text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
"I dedicate my entire being to guiding one and all
to an ideal world. To assure people that I can see
my goal through, 'strength' is but the minimum
requirement."

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Wow, President Rudolf! Can she be any cooler?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
She's got brains, beauty, and to top it all off,
strength! Everyone knows how amazing she is. No
one could doubt otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
She runs so effortlessly—no wonder people
admire her. I wonder how I can be like her?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? "Lately I've taken to visiting museums to
cultivate my senses." You don't say...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the museum...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
...Hrnh? Wh-what's going on in this painting? I
don't get it!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
One person's garden of delights is another
person's mystery. "I don't get it" is a perfectly
normal reaction to this particular triptych.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Eek! P-President Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How serendipitous. I didn't know you also had an
interest in Western art, Tsuyoshi.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Um, no! You see, I read an article about you
recently that said you enjoyed visiting museums!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I figured if I tried doing the same thing, then
maybe I could be as cool as you...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I see. Well, thank you. I'm humbled by the
bedazzling purity of your heart.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Be... what now? Thanks? I think?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
But paintings sure aren't easy to understand.
Right now, the only things I know are the artist
and the year the piece was painted.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm. How about I explain the paintings to you,
then? Think of me as your personal museum tour
guide!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
You'd really do that?! I mean, I don't want to take
up your free time...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, I can't ignore someone who looks up to me
as "cool." I may not be as informed as a curator,
but if that's all right with you, I'm happy to
oblige.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-whoa! Of course I wouldn't mind! I'm
looking forward to our tour!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Good. Let's start with this piece, then. It's one of
the artist's iconic works and is packed with
symbolic meaning. If you look to the rightmost
panel...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for today!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Your explanations were super easy to follow. I
learned a lot!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea you were so knowledgeable about
paintings! You really are amazing!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All I did was mention details that came to mind.
You were an excellent listener, so I had fun too.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure that you could talk about any
topic under the sun and people would stop to
listen!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
By the way, are you heading back to the academy
now? If you are, I was wondering if we could...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, I'm stopping by the drugstore first.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: What?! Are you feeling sick?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No. It's just that student council business has
been piling up lately, so I wanted to get some
vitamin drinks to shore up my defenses.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Lately? I feel like you're always going nonstop.
Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Um! If it's a vitamin drink you need, then... I can
make one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, on campus...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so this is the "Tsuyoshi Special Elixir" you
mentioned.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's got plum, lemon, pickled mackerel​... It's
packed with ingredients that work wonders to
restore energy!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I don't exactly have the hardiest constitution, so I
did my own research and came up with a drink
that works for me. That's one of my most
effective brews!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Word of warning, though—I tend to focus on what
works over what's tasty. I tried adapting the drink
for you, but it might still be...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're really gulping it down!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Uh! So, h-how is it?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...You put extra honey in it for me, didn't you? It
tastes good. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, you created this all by yourself? The flavor
profile is complex... I can tell you put a lot of
ingredients into it. Would you mind sharing your
recipe?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Oh! Uh, no! Of course not!
